description:
Extend the delegated-worker/orchestrator flow beyond immediate auto-landing. This epic covers two operator-visible landing level-ups now that `/bw delegate` is landing successfully:

1. staged/deferred landing so validated work can remain unmerged for independent human testing until explicitly brought in later
2. reviewer-agent gating before merge-back, with review outcomes interpreted against the bead intent and actual task goals rather than blindly following arbitrary review notes

Goal: keep the LLM/orchestrator responsible for the post-worker landing lifecycle, but allow more realistic policies than 'always merge immediately after validation'.
title: Add review-gated and deferred landing modes for delegated workers
